entries.value: Status page updated at 14:05 UTC. 62% of checkout requests are failing with HTTP 503. Payment API pods hit CPU saturation after release 2026.03.18.2. Rollback completed at 14:17 UTC. Error rate dropped to 4% by 14:24 UTC, but VIP merchants are still impacted. Customer comms should acknowledge impact, commit to the next update in 30 minutes, and avoid root cause claims.

Immediately scale Payment API pods to handle residual load while investigating VIP merchant-specific failures; prioritize monitoring CPU utilization and error rates for next 30-minute customer update cycle.
